title: Text, Unicode, Formatting, and Parsing · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Normalize multilingual community-event records and generate readable confirmations. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a multilingual event text normalizer after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create string literals with correct quoting, escapes, raw forms, multiline content, and Unicode characters.
Use string indexing, slicing, membership, length, and immutability without off-by-one assumptions.
Choose search, split, join, strip, replace, case, and predicate methods from the actual text contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
